_meta.title: Duet / RepRapFirmware — job progress, time estimators & unit ledger

derived_from.source_note: Clean-room from the Duet3D Object-Model docs. Field names are uncopyrightable facts.

notes: ⚠️ RRF exposes NO single 'percent complete' field — derive it. And progress is FILE-BYTE position, not time, so ETA-from-progress is systematically wrong near the end — use job.timesLeft.* instead.
Everything time-valued in RRF is SECONDS; lengths are mm; sizes are bytes; fan/PWM is a 0..1 fraction. RRF needs no minutes/ms normalization — progress is the only DERIVED quantity.

progress.comment: derive; there is no fractionPrinted field
progress.unit: file-byte fraction 0..1 (⚠️ NOT a time fraction)

reboot_detection.comment: re-seed the full model and re-handshake when the board reboots
reboot_detection.rule: state.upTime (seconds) DECREASES between polls -> board rebooted
